candidate.completion: send a calendar invite before my plants start giving dating advice.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please send a calendar invite before my plants start giving dating advice.

evaluation.rationale: The line has a clear comic image and a reasonably exact pivot in "calendar invite" and "plants start giving dating advice," but it stretches into escalation more than a clean conceptual reversal. It feels fresh and readable, though somewhat wordy and only moderately quotable.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
